query: soft focus dreamy out of focus defocused portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: soft focus dreamy defocused portraits

response.objective_caption: A close-up depiction of a human eye and partial facial features, rendered with extreme softness. A single bright pinpoint of light reflects in the eye, creating a small starburst. The visible skin and hair dissolve into smooth, indistinct tonal masses. The palette consists of deep browns, warm ambers, and near-black shadows. The framing isolates the eye in the upper left quadrant with hair sweeping diagonally across the lower portion.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, dreamlike close-up of a human eye with a reflective starburst pinpoint of light, rendered so soft that facial features and hair dissolve into smeared, indistinct brown and amber tonal masses. The extreme intentional blur eliminates nearly all fine detail and texture, creating an abstract, oppressive atmosphere of unease through crushed low contrast and suffocating warm shadows that obscure the subject into near-unrecognizability.
